column1: green location NA Specific Template Use Case/Title

column2: Change Ship Method or Carrier on PO Due to Item Count / Size (Supplier Entered) SOP (DSC2S) - VCN
column3: Hello (Customer Name), We’re reaching out with an update to your recent AllModern order (Order Number). Due to your item(s) being too large to ship with FedEx, we’ve upgraded your order to ship with a truck freight carrier (at no additional cost to you!). The items that need to travel via truck freight carrier typically take 5 - 7 business days longer in transit than FedEx. Once your order ships, you will receive an email with updated tracking information that will include your new estimates. When your order arrives in your local area and is ready for delivery, our freight carrier will be emailing you to provide a delivery date and a four-hour delivery window. You will not be required to be home for the delivery. You can also keep track of your order via "My Account" on our website. Your satisfaction is very important to us. Please do not hesitate to call or email us with any questions or concerns. Thank you for shopping with AllModern! Kind regards, YOUR_NAME

column3: Hello (Customer Name), We’re reaching out with an update to your recent ( INSERT STORE HERE: Wayfair/Joss & Main/Perigold/Birch Lane/AllModern ) order (Order Number). Good news! Your order will now be shipping with FedEx instead of a truck freight carrier. This change allows for faster delivery, and your package will arrive like a standard small parcel shipment. Once your order ships, you will receive an email with updated tracking information that will include your new delivery estimates. Since your order will be shipped via FedEx, it will be delivered directly to your address without the need to schedule a delivery appointment. You can also track your shipment anytime via "My Account" on our website. Your satisfaction is very important to us. Please do not hesitate to call or email us with any questions or concerns. Thank you for shopping with ( INSERT STORE HERE: Wayfair/Joss & Main/Perigold/Birch Lane/AllModern !) Kind regards, YOUR_NAME
